transfer_23bf246fa5.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
* What Failed: Test expecting NumberFormatException for non-numeric amount threw NullPointerException
* Where: TransactController.transfer (TransactController.java:130); test method at lines 199–200
* Why: this.user is null; code calls user.getUser_id() before parsing amount
* Investigate: Populate user (SecurityContext/session) or null-check; validate amount first; set mock user/auth in test,
scenarios: Successful payment when balance is greater than amount

transfer_89d8d3e845.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
* What Failed: Tests throw InvalidUseOfMatchersException due to improper Mockito usage
* Where: TransactControllerTransfer978Test.java lines 94/102 and 199/207
* Why: Mixed argument matchers with raw values on an 8-arg method; only 1 matcher recorded
* Investigate: Update stubbing/verify calls to use matchers for all params (eq for literals, any*/isNull as needed); ensure consistent org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers imports and avoid Hamcrest/raw arg mixing,
scenarios: Successful payment when balance is greater than amount
